MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-02-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CROSS DEFENDANT 1900 BRYANT STREET INVESTORS LLC'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINANT'S COMPLAINT.

Cross-defendant 1900 Bryant Street Investors, LLC's motion to strike portions of the first amended cross-complaint will be heard in department 501, the real property/housing court, at the same date and time. All future law and motion matters in this case must be noticed to be heard in department 501.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

Motion To Stirke Portions Of First Amended Cross Complainant'S Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-02-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Samuel A. Leff, esq. (510-457-3445) of Hartsuyker, Stratman & Williams-Abrego for Cross-Defendant/Plaintiff/Moving party 1900 Bryant Street Investors, LLC.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Cross-Defendant 1900 Bryant Street Investors, LLC's Motion To Strike Portions Of First Amended Cross Complainant's Complaint is GRANTED with leave to amend for Cross-Complainant to allege facts (not conclusions) to support malice, oppression, or fraud. All amendments shall be in bold font. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported (D501)
